{{Infobox character
| name = Jarelys Teach
| aliases = Jarelys
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = General, Guild Head of the Imperial Guard, Head of the Imperial Guard
| abilities = fly on a bird, wields the blade Tyrfang, Kameira graft
| affiliations = Imperial Guard, Magister's Guild
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Jarelys Teach Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jarelys [[Teach]] is a high-ranking military official serving as the General of the [[Empire]] and the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]]. She is characterized by her intimidating presence, often described as having a cold or piercing gaze that can make others feel as though they are facing an empress. Physically, she maintains a shaved head and wears distinctive red-and-black plate armor. She carries a notable [[sword]] named [[Tyrfang]] over her shoulder. Her physical capabilities and longevity are enhanced by having a [[Kameira]]'s heart, which provides her with increased strength and endurance. This biological modification has also led to potential risks, including the possibility of mental corruption or entering a transformative coma. As a leader, she commands the respect and immediate attention of her guards and is involved in high-level imperial affairs, including guarding the throne and participating in strategic meetings. She has been involved in intense combat, notably against [[Jorin Maze-walker]], and has demonstrated a willingness to protect others at great personal risk.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A General and the [[Guild]] [[Head of the Imperial Guard]], Jarelys [[Teach]] is characterized by her shaved hair, icy blue eyes, and red-and-black plate armor. She poses a significant threat to [[Calder Marten]], who seeks a way to prevent her from killing him and his crew. After returning to her post behind the throne, she arrives on her [[Kameira]] bird. During these events, she also voices her objection to [[Calder]] wearing the [[Emperor's crown]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is a General and [[Guild]] [[Head of the Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] has shaved hair and icy blue eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] wears red-and-black plate armor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] can fly on a bird.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is a General.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is a threat to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is someone [[Calder Marten]] wants to avoid killing him and his crew.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wants something to prevent [[Jarelys Teach]] from killing them.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] returned to her post behind the throne.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] returns on her [[Kameira]] bird.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is an individual who objects to [[Calder]] wearing the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|During a meeting of [[Guild Heads]], Jarelys [[Teach]] occupied a seat at one end of the table. Although [[Calder]] owes this individual nothing, Jarelys [[Teach]] is responsible for the death of [[Calder]]'s father. This figure wields the blade known as [[Tyrfang]] and is a necessary presence for the [[Imperial Guard]] to grant [[Bliss]] admission. While [[Meia]] has noted that she fell out of favor with Jarelys [[Teach]], the individual was also seen engaging in combat against [[Jorin Maze-walker]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] owes [[Jarelys Teach]] nothing.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jarelys Teach]] is required for the [[Imperial Guard]] to admit [[Bliss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jarelys Teach]] sat at one end of the table during a meeting of [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jarelys Teach]] killed [[Calder]]'s father.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jarelys Teach]] wields the blade [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] mentions she got on the bad side of [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jarelys Teach]] fought [[Jorin Maze-walker]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jarelys Teach]] is the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and wears red-and-black armor.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jarelys Teach]] has the support of the [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jarelys Teach]] is on guard duty.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Known as Jarelys, the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] has undergone significant physical modification by replacing her heart with a [[Kameira]] graft. While recovering from various wounds, she eventually came into contact with [[Rojric]] [[Marten]]. During a confrontation involving [[Jorin]]'s blade, she sustained further injuries. Despite these setbacks, it is revealed that her heart is actually that of a [[Bonereaver]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jarelys is the name [[General Teach]] is addressed by.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] is the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and has replaced her heart with a [[Kameira]]’s.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] is a character currently in recovery from wounds.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] touched [[Rojric]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] was wounded by [[Jorin]]'s blade.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] has the heart of a [[Bonereaver]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] has a [[Kameira]] graft.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jarelys Teach]] is the [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and is in a transformative coma.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Imperial Guard]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
